patch.value: GH-609: settings.json/schema/*.json have no merge driver; validate reports ok:true by silently falling back to defaults on unparseable config

Unparseable settings.json/schema files (e.g. containing conflict markers) fail validate with an explicit config-integrity check instead of silent default fallback; key-level JSON merge guidance or driver documented for config/schema; repro from GH-609 becomes a regression test

author: maintainer-agent
message: link validate-silent-skip sibling: same green-gate-masking class at config layer

patch.value: GH-609. settings.json + schema/{types,statuses,fields,workflows}.json are single git-tracked JSON files with no merge driver; conflicting edits leave conflict markers → invalid JSON → pm silently falls back to defaults and validate reports ok:true, so governance settings/custom schema are silently lost behind a green gate. Same masking class as pm-cxyv at the config layer. Fix direction: config-integrity validate check (parse failure = hard fail) + key-level JSON merge guidance/driver.
